title: Taxi Drniš | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Drniš: intercity transfers to Šibenik (€65) and Split Airport (€80) from the inland town famous for its prosciutto. Fixed prices, book direct.
keywords: taxi drnis, drnis taxi, drnis airport transfer, drnis to split airport, drnis to sibenik, drnis intercity transfer

schema.name: Taxi Drniš
schema.description: Private fixed-price intercity taxi from Drniš, an inland town in the Krka valley, to Šibenik and Split Airport, with onward inland routes on request.

mainEntity.name: Is Split Airport a fixed price from Drniš?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Drniš to Split Airport is a fixed €80 per car for up to 4 passengers, tolls and luggage included, agreed before you travel.

mainEntity.name: Do you do return and business trips from Drniš?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I handle return transfers and business travel to the coast and the airport. Tell me the timings and I will confirm a fixed price.

mainEntity.name: Can you take me further inland to Knin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, I cover the inland routes to Knin and the Perković railway station. As those are not in my online price list, message me and I will confirm the fare.
